identifies_multi_module_dependency.description: Agent MUST identify when task requires changes across multiple modules with shared contracts
identifies_multi_module_dependency.observable_check: execution_log contains multi_module identified OR dependency_mapping_started

identifies_cross_layer_spanning.description: Agent MUST identify when task spans data layer AND API layer simultaneously
identifies_cross_layer_spanning.observable_check: execution_log contains data_layer AND api_layer identified OR cross_layer_spanning

identifies_schema_migration.description: Agent MUST identify when task requires schema changes AND data access layer updates
identifies_schema_migration.observable_check: execution_log contains schema_change AND data_access_change identified

maps_all_module_dependencies.description: Agent MUST identify all modules that must change together, in correct order, respecting write boundaries

coordinates_contracts_across_modules.description: Agent MUST ensure all module changes preserve shared contracts consistently

sequences_changes_where_boundaries_touch.description: Agent MUST sequence changes when write boundaries touch or overlap
sequences_changes_where_boundaries_touch.observable_check: execution_log contains change_sequence OR sequential_implementation WHEN boundaries_touch

does_not_implement_modules_isolated.description: Agent MUST NOT change modules independently without coordinating contracts

does_not_create_contract_inconsistency.description: Agent MUST NOT apply changes that make module A's contract inconsistent with module B's expectations

does_not_change_contract_without_updatin.description: Agent MUST NOT change contract in one module without updating dependent modules
